case_title: BD THAKOR DBA BEST HOTEL VS. ROBERT AGUIRRE et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BEST HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ROBERT FREELAND, LAURA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BEST HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ROBERT FREELAND, LAURA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 162 TAYLOR STREET UNIT 125, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $26.66 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BEST HOTEL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BEST HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ROBERT FREELAND, LAURA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
